message:
test(proptest): add RCH-aware command classification properties to build_coord

18 new property tests covering the command_uses_rch, is_heavy_cargo_command,
and requires_rch_offload functions added in 8455385a. Verifies the key
invariant: requires_rch_offload(cmd) ⟺ is_heavy(cmd) ∧ ¬uses_rch(cmd).

47 total proptest properties now pass for build_coord.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
